query:
SELECT 'events' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM events
UNION ALL
SELECT 'event_participation' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM event_participation
UNION ALL
SELECT 'scheduled_webinars' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM scheduled_webinars;
